purpose: Size-matched ESM-2 baseline for the MAMMAL protein-embedding question FINDINGS.md flagged (Phase 5 only had ESM-2 8M). Same 25-protein x 5-family panel + same LOO NN-recall / intra-inter cosine-gap metric.

centered_anisotropy_check.note: Mean-centered embeddings before cosine (standard ESM anisotropy fix). If this is still < MAMMAL 0.92, the MAMMAL win is not a raw-cosine artifact.

head_to_head.recall_call: MAMMAL wins NN recall (0.92 vs ESM-650M 0.84)
head_to_head.note_on_gap: Cosine gap is NOT comparable across models — ESM raw-cosine bands sit very high (anisotropy), so its gap looks small even when NN recall is perfect. NN recall is the decision metric; gap is within-model context.
